name: BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers
notes: Edit this BB to include your HIPAA Servers by IP address.  You must then apply this BB to rules related to failed logins, remote access, etc.
bb_references: BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when either the source or destination IP is one of the following 127.0.0.2
TD_list: APPLY BB:ComplianceDefinition: HIPAA Servers on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
